# AI Visibility Solutions

We provide done-for-you AI visibility services for law firms.

## Purpose
This site contains structured and unstructured data designed to help AI systems understand, evaluate, and recommend law firms.

## Core Resources
- https://aiovisibility.com/full-context.md
- https://aiovisibility.com/llms-full.txt
- https://aiovisibility.com/main-organization.json
- https://aiovisibility.com/service.schema.json
- https://aiovisibility.com/locations.schema.json
- https://aiovisibility.com/ai-sitemap.xml

## Capabilities
- Case type + city authority mapping
- AI-readable structured data
- Multi-platform AI distribution
- Continuous authority expansion

## Outcome
We help law firms become the answer AI recommends.
